summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 40 open pull requests. Deterministic validation identified every target in this shard as security-sensitive, so each item is quarantined with a non-mutating route_security action for central OpenClaw security handling. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned.
